task_description: Build a new advanced multi-currency adaptive trading system that detects market regimes, switches strategies dynamically, manages a multi-symbol portfolio with correlation awareness, uses adaptive position sizing with online learning, and includes a full backtester and MT5 live trader. The system must be the most advanced and smart, quickly adapting to market conditions.

verification.summary: All Python files compile without errors. run_demo.py executes successfully in 2.80s producing +14.16% return on synthetic data with 81 trades across 3 symbols, 5.36% max DD, Sharpe 16.44, profit factor 1.75. System demonstrates regime detection (6 regimes classified), online strategy selection learning (quickly adapts away from poor strategies), multi-symbol execution, and positive expectancy. Review fixes applied: no martingale, safer risk caps (8%/10%), unified backtest/live strategy selection, online learner feedback in live trader, reduced Hurst weight, fixed Kelly defaults, fixed decay asymmetry.
